extShortDesc.message: A lightweight ZuBlock content blocker for modern Chromium browsers.

savedEditsTitle.description: Heading for the saved page edits pane

savedEditsIntro.message: Saved edits are applied automatically while each site is loading. Use them to keep unwanted page parts hidden on WhatsApp, Facebook, Twitch, or any other site you choose.
savedEditsIntro.description: Short explanation for saved page edits

savedEditsAddButton.description: Button label to save a permanent page edit

savedEditsAddTip.message: Save this page edit so ZuBlock hides it every time the site opens

savedEditsEmpty.message: No saved edits yet. Open a site, choose Save permanent edit, then pick what should disappear.

savedEditsCopyTip.description: Tooltip for copying a saved edit

savedEditsRemoveSiteTip.message: Remove all saved edits for this site

savedEditsUndoTip.description: Tooltip for undoing removal of a saved edit

savedEditsToggleTip.message: Turn saved edits on or off for this site without deleting them

developPageName.description: appears as tab name in dashboard. Inspired from 'Develop' menu in Safari, see https://developer.apple.com/documentation/safari-developer-tools/develop-menu

popupPageToolsUnavailable.message: Page tools work on normal websites. Browser pages such as the new tab cannot be edited by extensions.

popupTranslatorSave.description: Toggle label for persistent translation cache

popupTranslatorSaveTip.message: Reuse translated text so the same page does not need to be translated again every time

popupTranslatorStatusOn.message: On for normal websites. ZuBlock translates visible page text and keeps watching for new content.
popupTranslatorStatusOn.description: Status shown when the page translator is enabled

popupTranslatorStatusOff.message: Off by default. Click Translate to turn it on for visible page text.
popupTranslatorStatusOff.description: Status shown when the page translator is disabled

popupBraveCleanHint.message: Browser-level cleanup needs Brave settings or policies. ZuBlock can guide you there, but extensions cannot remove Brave's own buttons directly.

userScriptsInfo.message: To enforce cosmetic or scriptlet filters from imported lists, you must grant ZuBlock permission to run user scripts. Open your browser's extensions page (chrome://extensions in Chrome or about:addons in Firefox), open ZuBlock details, and toggle on Allow user scripts.
userScriptsInfo.description: A notice to inform user that the enforcement of some filters requires permission to execute 'user scripts'

defaultFilteringModeSectionLabel.description: The header text for the default filtering mode section

defaultFilteringModeDescription.message: The default filtering mode will be overridden by per-website filtering modes. You can adjust the filtering mode on any given website according to whichever mode works best on that website. Each mode has its advantages and disadvantages.
defaultFilteringModeDescription.description: This describes the default filtering mode setting

basicFilteringModeDescription.message:
Basic network filtering from selected filter lists.

Does not require permission to read and modify data on websites.

optimalFilteringModeDescription.message:
Advanced network filtering plus specific extended filtering from selected filter lists.

Requires broad permission to read and modify data on all websites.

completeFilteringModeDescription.message:
Advanced network filtering plus specific and generic extended filtering from selected filter lists.

Requires broad permission to read and modify data on all websites.

Generic extended filtering may cause higher web page resources usage.

noFilteringModeDescription.message: List of websites for which no filtering will take place.
noFilteringModeDescription.description: A short description for the editable field which lists trusted sites

noFilteringModePlaceholder.description: Default text for in edit field

behaviorSectionLabel.description: The header text for the 'Behavior' section

autoReloadLabel.message: Automatically reload page when changing filtering mode
autoReloadLabel.description: Label for a checkbox in the options page

showBlockedCountLabel.message: Show the number of blocked requests on the toolbar icon
showBlockedCountLabel.description: Label for a checkbox in the options page

enableStrictBlockLabel.description: Label for a checkbox in the options page

enableStrictBlockLegend.message: Navigation to potentially undesirable sites will be blocked, and you will be offered the option to proceed.
enableStrictBlockLegend.description: Short description for a checkbox in the options page

enablePopupBlockLabel.description: Label for a checkbox in the options page

enablePopupBlockLegend.message: When active, matching filters will automatically close unwanted browser tabs created by websites.
enablePopupBlockLegend.description: Short description for a checkbox in the options page

sandboxEditorLabel.description: Header for filter-creation section in the dashboard

developerModeLabel.description: Label for a checkbox in the options page

developerModeLegend.message: Enables access to features suitable for technical users.

settingsBackupRestoreLegend.message: Restoring will overwrite all your current custom settings.
